ab: kisasuaku ama’a kiira musa takuliliungu tamalʉngalʉ.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: kihlamuhlamu a kana’ana ihlahlamu. milaluihli a hlialuvuna.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: matiangahlangahla a kana’ana rumahlaʉ, angahli hlialuvu mutupiakʉ.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: hlimahlava a ama’ana papakalavungu hla saviki uvura tamalʉngalʉ.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: maku tatara nua tamalʉngalʉna arupakakari, matumuhlu a hlikihlahlamuisa kana’ana kisuahlahlama.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: miacikiriaku mualualu rumahlaʉ, puvahli a tamalʉngalʉ ihlaku mahlulangicacu, mataingalʉ aramasalangʉsangicu mʉmʉa.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: amihla ihlaku, “maci aramahlʉngicu a sapahlʉ tamalʉngalʉna ia, muacʉkʉhlʉkia saliahlamu takuliliungu.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
